notes: Branch A - primary profile-system task. Preflight clean: `coc validate` OK, `git status --porcelain` clean, `coc advance` promoted tsk-20260423-000002, tsk-20260423-000003, tsk-20260423-000004, tsk-20260423-000007, tsk-20260423-000008, and tsk-20260423-000009. Leased tsk-20260423-000002, read AGENTS.md, prompts/task-envelope.md, skills/profile-system/SKILL.md, schemas/system.schema.json, taxonomy/source/system-domains.yaml, taxonomy/source/system-classes.yaml, and only the cited source materials needed to profile the human gut microbiome. Wrote a new canonical system directory at registry/systems/sys-000002--human-gut-microbiome/ and validated it successfully with `uv run coc validate registry/systems/sys-000002--human-gut-microbiome/`. Acceptance-test wording says `status: active`, but the current schema and existing system records accept `status: profiled`; the record uses the schema-valid value and this mismatch should be corrected in task-generation guidance rather than forcing an invalid canonical record. `coc complete` also exposed a queue bug: the CLI moved the task to `done` before parsing the `--outputs` JSON and therefore raised a JSONDecodeError after the state transition; a manual `task.complete` event was appended to restore audit consistency.
